column1: # Manual person-name overrides for the JSON-dump import.
# Only labels the auto-matcher CANNOT resolve belong here:
#   - dump-only persons whose label has more than two tokens
#     first/last split is ambiguous (e.g. two first names AND/OR a compound
#   - labels the matcher flags as a collision (one label matches several DB
#     persons): set sync_uuid to the intended person's (shown in the report).
# Mechanical cases (a single extra first name on either side) are handled in
# code and must NOT be listed here.
# first_name = canonical first name (the dump's scheme; may contain a space)
# sync_uuid  = (optional) sync_uuid of the DB person to disambiguate a
#              collision; names alone are not unique
